title: Section 12
content: 1[The Chief Commissioner of Railway Safety shall, for each financial year, prepare in such form, and within such time, as may be prescribed, an annual report giving a full account of the activities of the Commissioners during the financial year immediately preceding the financial year in which such report is prepared and forward copies thereof to the Central Government.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 34 of 2009, s. 10, for section 12 (w.e.f. 7-9-2009).
